Description
DAREU EH416s Wired RGB Gaming Headset
The DAREU EH416s RGB Gaming Headset is a premium wired gaming accessory designed to deliver immersive sound, vivid visuals, and versatile connectivity. Featuring 50mm drivers, the DAREU EH416s Gaming Headphone ensures rich, clear audio across a wide frequency range of 20Hz to 20kHz and a sensitivity of 108 dB ± 3 dB, perfect for competitive gaming and multimedia use. This headset supports USB and 3.5mm wired connections, providing seamless compatibility with PCs, laptops, consoles, and mobile devices, making it a true DAREU EH416s RGB Gaming Headphone for multi-platform gamers. The dynamic RGB lighting with multiple modes adds a stylish, customizable aesthetic to any setup. Equipped with a flexible noise-canceling microphone with an omnidirectional pick-up pattern and -42 dB ± 3 dB sensitivity, the DAREU EH416s ensures crystal-clear in-game communication. Weighing just 320 grams, it delivers comfort for long gaming sessions while offering top-notch performance and eye-catching RGB effects. The DAREU EH416s Gaming Headphone is ideal for gamers who want both style and functionality.
Powerful 50 mm Drivers
The DAREU EH416s features large 50 mm drivers that deliver deep bass, clear mids, and crisp highs, ensuring an immersive gaming experience. Every detail—from gunshots and explosions to subtle footsteps—is reproduced with precision and clarity, putting you right at the heart of the action.
Dynamic RGB Lighting
Elevate your gaming setup with vibrant RGB illumination. The DAREU EH416s RGB Gaming Headset offers multiple lighting modes, allowing you to customize colors and effects to match your style or mood, creating a visually immersive gaming experience.
Flexible Noise-Canceling Microphone
The Flexible Noise-Canceling Microphone on the DAREU EH416s is designed for precision and clarity. Its bendable, windproof design allows 360° rotation, enabling you to position the mic perfectly for your voice. The omnidirectional microphone with -42 dB ± 3 dB sensitivity captures your voice clearly while minimizing background noise, ensuring smooth and professional communication during gaming or calls.

Description
Sennheiser HD 200 PRO Studio Headphone
The Sennheiser HD 200 PRO Professional Studio Headphones are a reliable tool for music creators, sound engineers, and enthusiasts who demand studio-quality audio in everyday settings. Designed with precision and decades of acoustic expertise, they deliver outstanding sound accuracy, dynamic range, and immersive comfort—all while maintaining an accessible price point. Whether you’re mixing a complex track, playing digital instruments, or simply relaxing to your favorite playlist, these headphones elevate your listening experience with balanced sound reproduction and superior detail. The Sennheiser HD 200 PRO reveals a soundscape that’s full of depth and clarity. With a frequency range of 20Hz–20kHz and 32Ω impedance, they offer clean mids, tight bass, and crisp highs without distortion. The maximum sound pressure level of 108dB and 500mW power handling make these headphones powerful enough for professional monitoring, validating mixes, and capturing subtle acoustic elements. Every beat, chord, and vocal layer comes alive in high resolution, giving you total control over your work and complete enjoyment of your music . The soft, ergonomic ear pads and lightweight construction are a result of Sennheiser’s decades of experience in wearable audio. The low-tension headband ensures a secure yet gentle fit, making long studio sessions or binge listening marathons feel effortless. These headphones sit comfortably over the ears, forming a snug seal that enhances both sound clarity and passive ambient noise reduction. This helps minimize external distractions, allowing you to focus on every audio detail—whether you're editing tracks or just zoning out to ambient rhythms. The Sennheiser HD 200 PRO includes a standard 3.5mm audio jack for laptops and mobile devices, along with a 6.3mm adapter for mixing consoles, electric pianos, and professional gear. This makes them suitable for both casual and studio environments, bridging the gap between personal enjoyment and professional production. Whether you’re recording in a controlled space or working on the go, the HD 200 PRO adapts to your workflow with ease. They strike the ideal balance between technical performance and user-centered design, giving you all the tools you need to listen, create, and refine your sound. For users looking for professional-grade monitoring headphones that combine high-resolution audio, ergonomic comfort, and intelligent noise isolation, the Sennheiser HD 200 PRO is an excellent choice.

Description
Neumann NDH 30 Open-Back Studio Headphone
The Neumann NDH 30 Open-Back Studio Headphone is precisely designed to provide the most accurate and natural sound reproduction possible, making it an excellent choice for essential listening jobs, including mixing, mastering, and high-precision editing. The NDH 30 has a dynamic open-back acoustic design and uses 38 mm neodymium transducers shielded by a cloth-covered grille to create an ultra-wide frequency response of 12 Hz to 34,000 Hz, guaranteeing every nuance of the audio spectrum is presented with lifelike clarity. With a nominal impedance of 120 ohms and a sensitivity of 104 dB SPL at 1 kHz/1 Vrms, this headset is designed to deliver strong, clear sound while keeping distortion levels at 0.03% even at 100 dB SPL. Its maximum input handling of 1000 mW and continuous power handling of 200 mW provide longevity in demanding professional applications. The NDH 30 is designed for comfort and robustness, with a durable yet lightweight headband made of spring steel strip, aluminum, and high-quality plastic fittings that provide stability throughout lengthy sessions. The circumaural ear cups are entirely composed of aluminum and have replaceable cloth-covered foam earpads for prolonged product life and greater wearing comfort. They also have an ideal ear cup pressure range of 5.5 to 6.8 N. The NDH 30 is foldable for easy portability and connects through a detachable, single-sided cable featuring a 3.5 mm (1/8") TRS plug and an included 6.3 mm (1/4") adapter, with a generous cable length of 3 meters (10 feet) to accommodate studio mobility. Internally balanced to minimize channel crosstalk, the NDH 30 ensures outstanding stereo imaging, offering razor-sharp localization and remarkable depth perception, making it ideal for immersive content creation, binaural mixes, and VR applications. Beyond its technical prowess, it embodies Neumann’s philosophy of providing a portable version of the reference-grade sound typically associated with their studio monitors, perfectly matching systems calibrated via the Neumann MA 1 Automatic Monitor Alignment. Finished in an elegant Black Edition, the NDH 30 not only excels in sonic performance but also meets professional demands for durability and environmental resilience, operating reliably between +5°C and +45°C and capable of being stored between -15°C and +70°C without compromise. Compact at dimensions of 245 x 255 x 84 mm and weighing 0.97 kg with packaging, the NDH 30 is the definitive portable reference tool for modern audio professionals seeking uncompromising linearity, transient precision, and consistency across all listening environments.
Excellent monitoring in Neumann Excellence
The goal of the NDH 30 was to make the reference sound of a Neumann studio monitor system, fully calibrated by MA-1, available anywhere in the form of an easily transportable headphone. Simultaneously, the NDH 30 establishes its sound reference for headphone reproduction, which is critical to customer success. The NDH 30 is the preferred choice for mixing and mastering because of its exceptional sound qualities. It is also suited to high-precision editing because of its superior long-term comfort. Its high-quality construction of spring steel and aluminum, as well as its comfortable handling characteristics, are substantially identical to those of the NDH 20. The NDH 30 is an open-back headphone, which means its dynamic 38 mm transducers function as acoustic dipoles. This enables their highly honed sound qualities to shine through: incredibly rapid transient response, dry bass, uncolored mids, and clear highs. In other words, the NDH 30 does not use sound coloring and instead reproduces the signal exactly.
The Handheld Sound Reference
The NDH 30 is a premium, circumaural open-back headphone that promises to take your music experience to new heights. The NDH 30 excels at producing fine detail resolution and high-precision stereo images. Its open-back design produces a natural and spacious soundstage, allowing for precise localization of each element in the mix. The NDH 30 is designed for the most demanding applications, with great transient response, making it an excellent choice for professional audio jobs including mixing, mastering, and critical listening. The headphones have a linear frequency response, which ensures the most precise and true representation of sound without coloring. Whether you are in the studio or working remotely, the NDH 30 provides a reference-quality listening experience, with accuracy and clarity on every note.

With powerful 16mm drivers and precise sound tuning, enjoy a wide, immersive audio range that enhances every stride. The open-ear design ensures safety by letting you stay connected to your surroundings, while the IPX4 water resistance protects against sweat and splashes during intense sessions. Whether you're training outdoors or hitting the gym, these lightweight, safety-conscious headphones combine high-performance sound with all-day comfort perfect for active lifestyles that demand both quality and awareness.

Oraimo BoomPop Lite Wireless Headphone
The Oraimo BoomPop Lite Wireless Headphones offer immersive sound with Sound360 spatial audio, up to 65 hours of battery life, and ENC noise cancellation for clear calls. With Bluetooth 5.3, dual-device pairing, and a low-latency game mode, they’re built for seamless multitasking and smooth gaming. The foldable design, AUX support, and compatibility with the Oraimo Sound App make them a versatile and travel-friendly choice for music lovers, gamers, and everyday users. Designed for all-day comfort, they feature soft ear cushions and an adjustable headband, making long listening sessions effortless. Whether you're working, commuting, or relaxing, the BoomPop Lite delivers reliable performance and premium features at an affordable price.
Lets Look into the Key Features of Oraimo BoomPop Lite
Sound360 Spatial Audio: Enhanced stereo sound with immersive spatial awareness.
Up to 65 Hours Playtime: Long-lasting battery life with 10-minute fast charge for 10 hours of use.
ENC Technology: Environmental Noise Cancellation ensures clear voice quality during calls.
Low-Latency Game Mode: Minimizes audio lag for smoother and more responsive gaming.
Dual-Device Connectivity: Allows seamless switching between two paired devices like phone and laptop.
Bluetooth 5.3 + AUX Support: Stable wireless connection with optional wired listening via 3.5mm cable.
Foldable & Portable Design: Compact and lightweight build for easy storage and travel.
Oraimo Sound App Compatibility: Customize EQ settings and audio profiles to suit your preferences.
Exceptional Battery Performance
The Oraimo BoomPop Lite Headphone is engineered for endurance, offering an impressive 65-hour battery life on a single charge. Whether you're commuting, working remotely, or enjoying extended listening sessions, this Oraimo Bluetooth Headphone ensures uninterrupted performance without the need for frequent recharging. Its power efficiency makes it a dependable companion for travel, long flights, or multi-day use, setting a new benchmark for battery longevity in the Oraimo Wireless Headphone category.
Compact and Travel-Ready Design
Designed with convenience in mind, the Oraimo BoomPop Lite Headphone features a lightweight and foldable design that enhances portability without compromising durability. Ideal for users on the go, this Oraimo Headphone easily fits into backpacks, laptop bags, or carry-ons, making it perfect for travel, daily commutes, or remote work setups. The ergonomic build ensures comfort during extended wear, while its compact form factor adds a layer of practicality to its stylish aesthetic.
Seamless Dual-Device Connectivity
Equipped with advanced Bluetooth 5.3 and dual-device connectivity, the Oraimo BoomPop Lite Headphone allows users to seamlessly switch between two connected devices such as a Mobile Phone and laptop without manual reconnection. This feature is especially useful for multitaskers who juggle calls, media playback, and productivity across platforms. As a smart and efficient Oraimo Wireless Headphone, it enhances workflow and entertainment by eliminating interruptions and streamlining device management.
Q1. How long does the battery last on Oraimo BoomPop Lite?
A: The headphones offer up to 65 hours of playtime in Bluetooth mode, with fast charging that gives 10 hours of use from just a 10-minute charge.
Q2. Does Oraimo BoomPop Lite support wired connection?
A: Yes, it includes a 3.5mm AUX cable for wired listening when Bluetooth isn’t available or the battery is low.
Q3. Can I connect the headphones to two devices at once?
A: Absolutely. Dual-device connectivity lets you pair with two devices and switch between them seamlessly.
Q4. Is it suitable for gaming?
A: Yes, it features a low-latency game mode that reduces audio lag for a better gaming experience. Just press the M button twice to activate.
Q5. Does it have noise cancellation?
A: The BoomPop Lite uses ENC (Environmental Noise Cancellation) to filter out background noise during calls, ensuring clear voice quality.
Q6. Is the Oraimo BoomPop Lite foldable and easy to carry?
A: Yes, the headphones have a foldable and retractable design, making them compact and travel-friendly.

Description
HAYLOU S40 ANC Bluetooth Headphone
The HAYLOU S40 ANC Bluetooth Headphones redefine premium audio experiences with a rich blend of cutting-edge technology, ergonomic design, and extended battery life. Equipped with a dual-driver system (40 mm + 20 mm titanium-coated drivers) and a dedicated tweeter, the S40 delivers pristine, full-range sound with deep bass, enhanced transient response, and adaptive EQ for dynamic tuning, certified with Hi-Res Audio and LDAC for audiophile-grade wireless performance. Active Noise Cancellation is taken to the next level with -50 dB ultra-wideband ANC, powered by a 5-mic hybrid dual-feedback array that intelligently adapts to different environments, from urban streets to libraries, while a Transparency Mode allows ambient sound to flow in without removing the headphones. Connectivity is seamless with Bluetooth 6.0 supporting A2DP, AVRCP, and HFP protocols, and the HAYLOU Smart-Connect app lets users customize ANC depth, EQ presets, gaming mode, and device names. Designed for gaming and streaming, the headphones offer 80 ms ultra-low latency and Pro Gaming Mode, while a pro-grade detachable 360° supercardioid mic with 48 kHz sampling ensures crystal-clear voice capture. The 650 mAh battery supports 90 hours of playback with ANC off and ~60 hours with ANC on, and rapid USB-C charging provides 5 hours of playback from just a 10-minute charge.

Superior Noise Cancellation & Sound Quality

With Hi-Res audio and 40mm drivers, it offers rich bass, crisp highs, and balanced sound quality—ideal for both immersive entertainment and clear communication. Beyerdynamic DT 990 Pro Open-back Studio Headphone
These open-back studio headphones are a reliable tool for any sound enthusiast. The wide stereo image and three-dimensional sound reproduction make the beyerdynamic DT 990 PRO headphones a loyal companion for producers. Outstanding tonal depth ensures that even small changes in the positioning of the acoustic source can be perceived while mixing. For decades now, professional users all around the world have placed their trust in our classic range: DT 770/880/990 PRO. These benchmark-setting studio headphones, available in three different models, boast extremely detailed resolution and very transparent sound. The circumaural headphones with their open-back design provide exceptional spaciousness and detailed tonal depth. Their mild bass and treble boost ensures a pleasant sound. The bass is not overstated but rather precise and the treble boost is powerfully present without sounding sharp. The single-sided cable allows the headphones to be put on and taken off frequently without cables getting tangled, and soft, adjustable ear cups provide for added comfort. The robust spring steel headband design ensures that the over-ear headphones also offer a secure fit. The DT 990 Edition headphones for use at home and the DT 990 PRO studio headphones: Soundwise, both models are identical as they feature identically designed acoustic transducers. There are fundamentally two differences between the models. Firstly, the Edition models have a softer headband for enjoying music at home whereas the PRO headset has a slightly firmer fit. Secondly, the Edition models come equipped with a straight cable whereas the PRO models come with a coiled cable. One aspect that sets our products apart from the rest is that they are handmade in Germany. We are particularly proud of the durability of our products, because all the components used are replaceable if necessary.

Description
Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Canceling Wireless Headphone
The Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphones offer exceptional audio quality and immersive noise cancellation. These headphones, which include industry-leading noise cancellation technology that adjusts to your environment, ensuring that you can enjoy your music without distractions. Engineered to perfection, the WH-1000XM5 produces outstanding sound, with rich, dynamic audio reproduction that brings your music to life. Stay connected with crystal-clear hands-free calling, and the ultra-comfortable and lightweight design with soft fit leather guarantees long-term comfort, even during longer listening sessions. With up to 30 hours of battery life and rapid charging features (just 3 minutes of charging delivers 3 hours of playback), you may listen to music all day without interruption. The WH-1000XM5 headphones have intuitive touch controls for easy operation, including Speak-to-Chat and Quick Attention modes, which allow you to pause your music and listen to ambient sound with a single motion. Furthermore, with Multipoint connectivity, you can easily swap between devices for increased convenience. The revised folding case allows for quick and efficient storage, fitting neatly into your backpack when not in use. Furthermore, the Quick Access function allows you to connect your wireless headphones to your favorite music streaming services with only a few clicks, without having to reach for your phone. Whether you're commuting, working out, or simply relaxing at home, the Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphones provide an unrivaled music experience, combining sophisticated technologies, superior comfort, and simple controls for the best listening experience.
Distraction-free Listening
The WH-1000XM5 headphones change the laws of distraction-free listening. Two processors handle eight microphones, providing remarkable noise cancellation and call quality. The WH-1000XM5 headphones include a freshly designed driver, DSEE - Extreme, and Hi-Res audio capability, and they give incredible audio quality.
Industry-leading noise cancellation
From airport noise to people's voices, our WH-1000XM5 wireless headphones with 8 noise cancellation microphones block out more high and mid frequency noises than before. With the new Auto NC Optimizer, noise cancellation is automatically tuned based on your wearing conditions and surroundings.
A new sound experience for AR gaming
The WH-1000XM5 employs new sensors and spatial sound technologies to provide immersive sound for augmented reality games such as Niantic's "Ingress"11,12. When playing "Ingress" with the WH-1000XM5, sensor and spatial sound technologies provide a unique experience: utilizing head tracking, sound is sent from various angles to exactly match the action on the screen.
Crystal Clear hands-free calling
Precise Voice Pickup Technology and powerful audio signal processing ensure that the person on the other end of the call can clearly hear your voice, even in busy settings. Our noise reduction system was built using AI machine learning utilizing over 500 million speech samples to suppress ambient noise and extract your voice clearly in a variety of scenarios.
High-Resolution Audio with and without wires
The WH-1000XM5 offers both High-Resolution Audio and High-Resolution Audio Wireless, due to LDAC, our industry-standard audio coding technology. LDAC transfers around three times more data2 than traditional Bluetooth audio, resulting in outstanding High-Resolution Audio quality.
4 Microphones to Focused on Your Voice
The WH-1000XM5 headphones include four beamforming microphones and are optimized to pick up only your voice. They can capture every single syllable thanks to an increased signal-to-noise ratio, even when there is a lot of noise.

Honor Choice Pro ANC Wireless Headphone
The Honor Choice Pro Headphones provide a high-quality audio experience with a variety of outstanding features. These Honor Bluetooth Headphone which uses Bluetooth 5.4, provide a reliable wireless connection for up to 10 meters, giving you complete freedom of movement. The Honor Over-Ear Headphone has 40 mm speakers for rich, high-quality sound, and the 3.5 mm gold-plated connector assures outstanding wired audio quality. With a Type-C USB charging cord and a 5VDC, 1A input, the headphones may be fully charged in as little as 2 hours. Enjoy up to 80 hours of audio playback in Bluetooth mode or 40 hours with active noise reduction turned on. The Honor Headphones have a talk time of up to 40 hours without noise cancellation and 30 hours with it on. These headphones have a sensitivity of 100 dB SPL at 1 kHz, a frequency response range of 20 Hz to 20 kHz, and an impedance of 32 Ohms, providing superb sound clarity. The package includes a 1-meter USB cable and a 1.2-meter AUX cable for wired connections. The 3.7V, 800mAh battery allows for long-lasting performance. These Honor Choice Pro Headphones are adaptable and easily connected to a wide range of devices since they support HFP, A2DP, and AVRCP profiles. The Honor Choice Pro Headphones can endure temperatures up to 45℃, making them suitable for various settings.
3 Microphones for noise-canceling calls
The Honor Choice Pro Headphone is a flexible set of wireless headphones that offer an immersive music experience with sophisticated capabilities such as active noise cancellation (ANC). These headphones include a robust three-microphone system and exceptional noise-canceling capabilities, allowing for crystal-clear calls even in busy surroundings. When making a call, both your and the other person's voices are audible throughout the chat. The headphones support high-resolution audio for enhanced sound quality and have a long battery life, lasting up to 80 hours on a single charge. The Honor Choice Pro Headphone has a Bluetooth 5.4 connection, ensuring reliable and rapid pairing with devices, making them an excellent choice for both music enthusiasts and those who value clear communication during conversations.
Adapt to the shape of your ear canal
The HONOR choice Pro Headphone features advanced technology that adapts to the unique shape of your ear canal. By using specialized algorithms, these headphones can detect the contours of your ear and automatically adjust the noise-canceling settings for an optimized listening experience. This personalized approach ensures better sound isolation and comfort, allowing you to enjoy immersive audio tailored to your ear shape.

AKG K92 Closed-back Professional Headphone
The AKG K92 Closed-back Professional Headphone is a versatile and affordable audio solution suitable for both studio and casual use. These closed-back headphones have 40mm drivers that produce clean, precise sound throughout a frequency range of 16 Hz to 22 kHz, ensuring accurate audio reproduction for mixing, monitoring, and general listening. The closed-back design offers great noise isolation, making them suitable for recording and use in noisy venues. With a low impedance of 32 ohms, the K92 may be powered by a wide range of devices, including professional audio interfaces and smartphones. The lightweight design and self-adjusting headband provide comfort during long listening sessions, while the gold-plated plug assures a dependable connection. The AKG K92 headphones achieve a mix of professional-grade performance and cost, making them ideal for home studios, audio aficionados, and anybody looking for good sound on a budget. The AKG K92 exemplifies the brand's commitment to audio excellence, offering a low-cost entry point into the world of professional-grade headphones.
Precision and Clarity with AKG K92
The AKG K92 Closed-back Professional Headphones deliver impressive audio quality that punches above their price point. Driven by large 40mm drivers, they produce a well-balanced sound signature across the frequency spectrum. The bass is tight and controlled, while the midrange shines with remarkable clarity, crucial for critical listening tasks. High frequencies are crisp and detailed without becoming harsh, allowing for extended listening sessions. The closed-back design enhances perceived clarity by providing excellent isolation from external noise. Despite their affordable price, the K92s offer a surprisingly wide soundstage for closed-back headphones, allowing good instrument separation and imaging. While they may not rival ultra-high-end monitors, the AKG K92's balanced, accurate reproduction makes them a reliable tool for both studio work and enjoyable music listening, satisfying professionals and audiophiles alike.

Description
Xtrike Me GH-712 RGB Gaming Headphone
The Xtrike Me GH-712 RGB Gaming Headphone is a high-end wired headset designed to provide great audio quality and immersive gaming experiences. These headphones have huge 50mm drivers that create rich, detailed sound across a wide frequency range of 20Hz to 20KHz. Whether you're exploring enormous virtual worlds or partaking in fierce online combat, the GH-712 guarantees that every sound, from subtle environmental signals to explosive action moments, is conveyed clearly and precisely. The GH-712 is designed for comfort and durability, with soft, ergonomic ear cushions that provide passive noise isolation, enabling you to focus on your game without being distracted by extraneous noise. The adjustable headband provides a secure and comfortable fit for lengthy gaming sessions, easily adapting a variety of head sizes and shapes. The GH-712 incorporates a high-sensitivity omnidirectional microphone to allow for smooth communication with colleagues. The 6.0x5.0mm microphone has a sensitivity of -40±3dB and an impedance of 2.2KΩ, ensuring clear sound recording. Whether you're discussing with teammates or coordinating in-game strategies, the microphone guarantees that your voice is heard clearly and without background noise. The GH-712's attraction is enhanced by its eye-catching RGB headband and dynamic running horse light generating mode. This programmable RGB lighting not only improves the headset's aesthetics, but it also adds a dynamic visual aspect to your gaming setup, providing an immersive environment that represents your gaming preferences. The GH-712's braided 2m±0.15m cable is durable and flexible, reducing tangling and assuring dependable connection. It features a 3.5mm 4PIN Aux port and a USB LED power source, allowing you to control and adjust the RGB lighting effects straight from your smartphone. The GH-712 is compatible with a variety of gaming systems, including PS5, PS4, Xbox, Switch, PC, and devices having a 3.5mm CTIA interface, providing diverse connecting choices. Whether you're gaming on a console, PC, or mobile device, this headset ensures smooth integration and reliable performance. The Xtrike Me GH-712 RGB Gaming Headphone excels in both performance and aesthetics, with high-quality audio, programmable RGB illumination, and ergonomic comfort. It is an excellent alternative for gamers wishing to improve their gaming experience with immersive sound and colorful pictures, ensuring that they stay on top of their game.

Onikuma X20 RGB 7.1 Surround Sound Gaming Headset
The Onikuma X20 RGB 7.1 Surround Sound Gaming Headset is an excellent choice for gamers who want both performance and style. The Onikuma X20 RGB Gaming Headphones include 50mm high-precision speaker drivers, a broad frequency response of 20Hz to 20,000Hz, an impedance of 32Ω ± 15%, and a sensitivity of 116dB ± 3dB, making them ideal for immersive gaming. The Onikuma X20 Gaming Headset, which uses superior 7.1 surround sound technology, provides a broad sonic environment that boosts spatial awareness, making it ideal for competitive gaming. The built-in noise-canceling omnidirectional microphone (6.0 × 2.7mm) with -36dB ± 3dB sensitivity and 2.2kΩ impedance guarantees your speech is easily heard, even in noisy surroundings. With ultra-soft over-ear cushions, an adjustable headband, and a 2.2m braided cable, comfort comes first. The headset connects via USB making it very compatible with PCs, laptops, PS4, mobile phones, iPads, and MP3/MP4 players; however, some devices may require a 2-to-1 splitter. Visually, the Onikuma X20 RGB Gaming Headset stands out with dynamic RGB lighting on the earcups, and it draws power from a DC5V source at less than 100mA. The Onikuma X20 Headphone is 22 x 9 × 20cm and weighs 380g, making it ideal for lengthy gaming sessions. This model enhances your gaming experience by combining rich sound, clear communication, and a fashionable style, whether you are seeking an Onikuma X20 RGB Headphone or just a dependable Onikuma Headphone.

Audio Technica ATH-M50xSTS USB StreamSet Streaming Headset
The Audio Technica ATH-M50xSTS USB StreamSet Streaming Headset is the world's first professional streaming headset that combines the classic studio sound of the ATH-M50x headphones with the clarity of the iconic 20 Series microphones. It is designed for streamers and content creators. With a cardioid condenser microphone and two unique earpad types to choose from, this headset provides the optimum studio-quality sound for you and your streaming audience. The Audio Technica ATH-M50xSTS USB StreamSet Streaming Headset is based on the critically acclaimed ATH-M50x. StreamSet has the same 45 mm large-aperture drivers as the Stream, but with two sets of replaceable earpads: M50x earpads that prioritize audio quality and sound isolation, and mesh and leatherette earpads that emphasize breathability and comfort. The cardioid condenser microphone on the StreamSet, adapted from the renowned 20 Series studio microphones, provides studio-quality articulation and intelligibility. The microphone's design sets it at the end of a flexible boom arm, keeping the mic near to your lips and aiding in the rejection of background noise and the delivery of crystal-clear audio. Simply flipping the boom arm into the up position mutes the microphone fast and efficiently.

Description
Logitech Zone 300 Wireless Bluetooth Headphone
The Logitech Zone 300 Wireless Headphone is precisely designed to improve audio quality and communication clarity, making it an excellent choice for both professionals and music aficionados. These headphones include two beamforming microphones and innovative noise-canceling algorithms, which work together to reduce ambient noise and guarantee that your speech is conveyed with remarkable clarity during conversations. The headphones are built with adjustable frequency responses to meet a variety of audio demands. In conversation mode, they have a frequency response range of 100-7KHz, which ensures clean and realistic voice reproduction. In music mode, the frequency response ranges from 50 to 20KHz, providing a rich, full-spectrum audio experience that captures the intricacies of your favorite songs. The 30 mm drivers produce a powerful and immersive sound, while the sensitivity of 96dB ±3dB 1kHz assures strong and clear audio output. Logitech Zone 300 complies with the EN 50332-2 standard, which means it follows audio safety rules to preserve your hearing during extended usage. The built-in lithium-ion battery offers long-lasting performance and allows you to roam freely without being attached by cords. This wireless simplicity, along with the Zone 300's lightweight and comfy design, makes it ideal for extended usage throughout the day, whether you're in a business meeting, listening to music, or playing games.
Stay Connected
Switch seamlessly between PC and smartphone with Zone 300 headphone. Multipoint Bluetooth allows you to pair up to six devices and connect to two at the same time. Move freely around your house or business and stay consistently connected, even from 30 meters away.
All Day Battery Life
Get up to 20 hours of listening time and 16 hours of speaking time on a full charge. Battery life may vary depending on the user and computer environment. A 5-minute rapid charge of Logitech Zone 300 allows for up to an hour of conversation time.
More Recycled Material
Logitech is dedicated to building a more sustainable future. Zone 300's plastic pieces are constructed of up to 55% post-consumer recycled plastic. Zone 300's plastic content: Rose and Off-white use 42% recycled plastic, whereas Black uses 55%, omitting printed wiring assemblies (PWA), cables, and packaging. By carefully selecting components like batteries and magnets and reworking the circuit board, we were able to minimize an estimated 1 kg CO₂e per product, comparable to charging a smartphone 122 times.
Customize the Experience with Logi Tune
Logi Tune lets you manage your music and meeting experience. The Logi Tune13 of Logitech Zone 300 allows you to customize your audio experience by adjusting the sidetone, mic level, and EQ.Logi Tune is available for Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android. Logi Tune is a desktop and mobile app for Logitech headsets available at logitech.com/tune, the Apple App Store, and the Google Play store. Plus, keep your gadgets up to date and attend meetings with a single click.

Description
Neumann MT 48 U Type-C Audio Interface
The Neumann MT 48 U Type-C Audio Interface is a luxurious desktop solution that complements Neumann's world-class studio microphones, KH series speakers, and NDH headphones. The Neumann MT 48 U Audio Interface has high-precision AD converters that produce an incredible 136dB dynamic range while supporting resolutions of up to 24-bit/192kHz for unrivaled reference-quality sound. This Neumann Audio Interface features two ultra-low-noise mic preamps with up to 78dB of gain and two line/instrument inputs that capture every sound element with astounding clarity. The Neumann MT 48 U has four analog outputs (2 x XLR, 2 x 1/4" TRS) and two superior headphone outputs, ensuring faultless monitoring and easy outboard gear interfacing. The Neumann MT 48 U Audio Interface, which includes advanced DSP processing such as a fully parametric 4-band EQ, dynamics processor, and studio-grade reverb, provides direct control over four separate monitor mixes, all accessible via an intuitive touchscreen interface with built-in talkback functionality. The Neumann MT 48 U USB-C/Dante audio interface smoothly integrates into current, networked studio setups, providing broad digital connections like as ADAT, S/PDIF, Dante, and AES67, as well as Ethernet capability. The machine also includes MIDI I/O (via 1/4" TRS with adaptor supplied separately), which increases its flexibility. It is compatible with both Mac (macOS 10.15-13) and Windows (Windows 10 64-bit or later), operating via USB 2.0 via a Type-C connection and powered by an integrated universal 9V-15V DC converter with US and EU plugs. The Neumann MT 48 U Type-C Audio Interface, which measures 7.87" x 5.03" x 1.57" and weighs 2.09 lbs, combines Neumann's famed audio brilliance with next-generation control in a compact, powerful package.

Description
Audio Technica ATH-M50xBT2 Wireless Over-Ear Headphone
The Audio Technica ATH-M50xBT2 is the second-generation wireless over-ear headphone that brings the legendary M50x studio sound to a versatile Bluetooth design. Combining exceptional audio quality with modern wireless convenience, these headphones offer up to 50 hours of battery life, improved call quality, and a host of user-friendly features for both audio professionals and music enthusiasts.
Legendary Studio Sound on the Go
The ATH-M50xBT2 delivers the critically acclaimed sonic signature of the original M50x studio headphones in a wireless format. Equipped with proprietary 45mm large-aperture drivers and a dedicated amplifier, these headphones provide exceptional clarity across an extended frequency range, complete with deep, accurate bass response. The over-ear design ensures excellent sound isolation, making them perfect for use in noisy environments or for immersive listening experiences.
Enhanced Communication and Connectivity
Communication gets a significant upgrade with the ATH-M50xBT2. Dual mics and beamforming technology ensure crystal-clear call quality, while sidetone circuitry allows you to hear your own voice during calls for more natural conversations. The multipoint pairing function enables connection to two Bluetooth devices simultaneously, and the low latency mode improves audio-video synchronization for smooth streaming and gaming. With support for voice assistants like Amazon Alexa, Google Assistant, and Siri, these headphones offer seamless integration with your digital life.
Customizable Experience and Lasting Comfort
The ATH-M50xBT2 is designed for personalized, long-lasting comfort. The A-T Connect app allows users to activate low latency mode, adjust EQ settings, change L/R volume balance, and even locate misplaced headphones. The professional-grade earpad and headband material ensure durability and comfort during extended listening sessions. With up to 50 hours of continuous use on a full charge and the option for a wired connection, these headphones adapt to your lifestyle, whether you're commuting, working, or simply enjoying your favorite music.

Honor Choice Wireless Headphone
The Honor Choice Headphone provide an amazing audio experience with a frequency response range of 20Hz to 20kHz and an impedance of 32 ohms, resulting in clean and balanced sound across all frequencies. The Honor Headphone with 40mm speakers delivers immersive sound quality ideal for gaming and music. With an 800 mAh battery, these Honor Bluetooth Headphones provide up to 80 hours of continuous playback without the need to recharge, making them great for extended listening sessions. These headphones decrease background noise by using passive noise cancellation (PNC) and environmental noise cancellation (ENC), resulting in clear audio for calls and games. The Honor Over-Ear Headphone has two separate work profiles: Game Mode for gaming and Bass Boost Mode for improved low frequencies, making it suitable for all audio tastes. The dual microphones improve conversation, and the lightweight design (weighing only 230 grams) guarantees comfort during continuous usage. These microphones combine with ENC technology to filter out ambient noise, ensuring that your voice is clear and distinct throughout discussions. Noise-canceling headphones employ a mix of internal and exterior microphones to pick up ambient noise and focus on your voice. The inbuilt microphones give signals to the noise-canceling circuitry, which produces sound waves to cancel out undesirable sounds. Meanwhile, the external microphones improve speech quality for calls, making the Honor Choice Headphones an excellent choice for consumers who require clear communication even in busy surroundings.
Exclusive Gaming Mode
The Honor Choice Headphones Game Mode aims to improve your gaming experience by reducing audio-video synchronization difficulties. The 50ms audio delay guarantees that the sound is perfectly aligned with the action on the screen. This function uses aural cues to correctly determine opponents' positions, offering players a competitive advantage in games where awareness of surroundings is essential. The increased audio synchronization enables a more immersive and strategic game experience, making it simpler to locate and destroy opponents.

Description
Vention BIFBF 1 Meter Type-C to 3.5mm Audio Converter
The Vention BIFBF Audio Converter is an excellent product that bridges the gap between contemporary USB-C devices and older 3.5mm AUX audio systems. The Vention BIFBF 1 Meter Audio Converter is ideal for smartphones, tablets, and laptops with a USB-C connector. It connects effortlessly to vehicle stereos, speakers, or headphones, assuring smooth playing of music, podcasts, or navigation audio. Built with a professional DAC (Digital-to-Analog Converter) chip and an enameled copper conductor, it produces crystal-clear, high-fidelity music with precise DAC decoding at a sample rate of 16bit/48KHz, minimizing distortion and keeping audio purity. Its plug-and-play technology requires no driver installation and provides rapid responsiveness for continuous usage. For increased longevity and robust signal transmission, the USB-C male to 3.5mm male interface of the cable has been nickel-plated. Apple AirPods Max
The Apple AirPods Max have a stylish appearance and high-quality construction for excellent audio performance. It also has a fantastic active noise cancellation technology and a transparency mode that allow it to create high-quality audio noise-free. You can enjoy comfort when wearing and listening to music using AirPods. All things considered, it strikes the ideal balance between the seamless magic of AirPods and thrilling high-fidelity audio. The headphones provide the most comfortable and personalized listening experience.
Incredible Design
The elegant and entirely original design of AirPods Max is very remarkable. There has been a complete makeover of these over-ear headphones. The finest acoustic seal for a range of head shapes is provided by the uncompromising fit of the AirPods Max, which completely immerses you in every sound.
Awesome Audio Performance
AirPods Max offer an unparalleled listening experience thanks to its combination of industry-leading Active Noise Cancellation and high-fidelity audio. Their precisely built driver's parts all work together to produce sound over the audible range with extremely little distortion. Six outward-facing microphones are used by AirPods Max headphone to detect sounds in your immediate vicinity and shut out unwanted external sound. Two inward-facing microphones are used to monitor what you are hearing. Beamforming microphones separate your speech from other sounds.
Outstanding Noise Cancellation
The Apple H1 processor of Apple AirPods Max, which has at least 10 audio cores to handle Adaptive EQ, active noise cancellation, transparency mode, and spatial audio, is contained in each earcup of the AirPods Max. A jet going overhead will appear to be truly passing over you if you're watching a movie with Dolby Atmos.
Satisfactory Battery Life
Apple AirPods Max battery life is one of the most crucial aspect of an electric device. Having an excellent battery life is crucial for wireless headphones. You may talk, watch a movie, or listen to music for 20 hours when Active Noise Cancellation and Spatial Audio are activated by Apple AirPods Max headphone so that you won't experience any charging problems during your enjoyable long trip. For that reason, don't be angry if you are rushing. for the reason that a quick 5-minute charge provides 1.5 hours of listen time. To charge, simply connect using the Lightning connector.

Description
Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Canceling Wireless Headphone (Official)
The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphone is a premium audio solution that delivers immersive sound, crystal-clear calls, and industry-leading noise reduction. With 12 built-in microphones, it provides precise noise reduction using innovative technologies such as the Adaptive NC Optimizer and Personal NC Optimizer, which change automatically to your environment. The Sony Wireless Headphones enable 360 Spatial Sound Personalizer for a more personalized listening experience and provide high-resolution audio both connected and wirelessly. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone is a foldable, over-ear design with ultra-soft padding, making it both comfortable and portable. Bluetooth 5.3 provides robust, low-latency communication over a range of up to 10 meters. SBC, AAC, LDAC, and LC3 audio formats are all supported, providing flexibility and interoperability with a wide range of devices. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone has an impressive battery life, providing up to 30 hours of audio playback with noise cancellation turned on and up to 40 hours without it. You can chat for up to 24 hours with noise cancelling active and up to 28 hours without. Charging is done via USB, and the lithium battery provides long-term power reliability. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Headphone features a 30mm neodymium driver with a frequency response of 4 Hz to 40,000 Hz, resulting in powerful bass and clear highs. Other features include ambient sound mode, rapid attention, and SCMS-T content security. Bluetooth profiles supported include A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, HSP, TMAP, and PBP, which allow broad interoperability with smartphones, tablets, and other devices. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphones are ideal for both audiophiles and daily users, thanks to their clever features, adaptive noise control, and superb music quality.
Noise Cancellation With Adaptive Microphone System
The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphone has a powerful processors and an adaptive microphone system; noise cancellation is optimized in real time—so your world remains undisturbed and your sound remains pure. With seven times quicker processing speeds than its predecessor, the HD Noise Cancelling Processor QN3 fine-tunes 12 microphones in real-time, resulting in a significant improvement in noise cancellation, sound quality, and call clarity. Noise cancellation adapts more precisely to your fit and environment when microphones are placed appropriately, resulting in effortless and powerful sound.
360 Spatial Sound Personalizer
With the Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphones, you can enjoy a thrilling Dolby Atmos experience as well as 360 Spatial Sound that adapts to your ears. With the Sony 360 Spatial Sound Personalizer app, you will get a sound experience tailored to you. When coupled with BRAVIA XR TVs, the software detects and analyzes your ear shape, allowing these headphones to generate your spatial sound environment.
High-Resolution Audio
The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone offers both High-Resolution Audio and High-Resolution Audio Wireless, due to LDAC, our industry-standard audio coding technology. LDAC delivers around three times as much data as normal Bluetooth audio, resulting in outstanding High-Resolution Audio quality. DSEE Extreme utilizes Edge-AI (Artificial Intelligence) to upscale compressed digital audio files in real time. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone dynamically recognises instruments, musical genres, and specific song elements, restoring high-range sound lost during compression.
Ultra-clear calls
Intelligent beamforming isolates your speech from surrounding noise, ensuring that you are always heard—even when others are speaking. Do it immediately, right from your headphones. The Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Cancelling Wireless Headphone uses a six-microphone AI-based beamforming system to focus on your speech while filtering out surrounding noise, ensuring that every word is heard clearly and sharply, even in hectic environments.
Foldable design
The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphone is designed with precision, and its folding mechanism use modern metal injection processes for a seamless, robust fold, resulting in a design that is both refined and resilient. Designed to fit perfectly into bags and aircraft pockets, the tiny case now has a magnetic closure for simple access, ensuring that your headphones are always ready to go.

Description
Inbertec CB110M Mono Noise Cancellation Professional Bluetooth Headphone
The Inbertec CB110M Mono Noise Cancellation Professional Bluetooth Headphone combines cutting-edge technology with a superb audio experience. Its Qualcomm cVc voice suppression-powered noise cancellation technology guarantees crystal-clear communication in every setting. With a frequency range of 100 Hz to 10 kHz and a sensitivity of -32 dB±2 dB at 1 kHz, the unidirectional microphone provides clear and accurate sound transmission. Rich, powerful sound is produced by the headphones thanks to their Φ28 speaker size and stereo channel arrangement. Offering a broad frequency range of 100 Hz to 10 kHz, they have a sensitivity of 95±3 dB and a maximum input power of 20 mW. The 350mAh battery life of the Inbertec CB110M Mono Noise Cancellation Professional Bluetooth Headphone allows for up to 22 hours of talk time and 19 hours of music playback. Up to 500 hours of standby time when connected guarantees continuous use. You can quickly resume listening to your music thanks to the Type-C interface's 1.5-hour charging period. Stable and effective wireless connectivity is guaranteed by Bluetooth 5.1+EDR/BLE, offering an amazing range of up to 30 meters. With their over-the-head style and protein leather ear cushions, the headphones are made with comfort in mind. HSP, HFP, A2DP, AVRCP, SPP, and AVCTP are among the supported protocols, providing a range of connectivity options. The Inbertec CB110M Mono Professional Bluetooth Headphone offers a complete solution for individuals looking for superior communication and audio quality.

Description
Sony WF-C510 TWS Earbuds
The Sony WF-C510 TWS Earbuds are designed to deliver a smooth and comfortable listening experience, making them an excellent choice for anyone looking for high-quality wireless music. These Sony WF-C510 Earbuds include a Multipoint Connection, which allows you to connect to two Bluetooth® devices at the same time, enabling seamless transitions between calls and music. Users may adjust their audio experience for the best sound quality by using the Sony | Headphones Connect app's EQ customization. The Sony WF-C510 BT Earbuds are available in four beautiful colors: blue, yellow, black and white. They combine practicality and beauty. The 5-minute rapid charge function gives up to an hour of playing, reducing downtime for consumers on the go. These Sony Earbuds, with an IPX4 water-resistant certification, are ideal for workouts and regular commuting, giving protection against splashes and perspiration. The Sony WF-C510 TWS has a Bluetooth 5.3 connection and a solid 10-meter wireless range. It supports A2DP, AVRCP, HFP and HSP profiles, as well as SBC and AAC audio codecs for high-quality streaming. The frequency response (Bluetooth) of 20 Hz to 20,000 Hz provides rich, full-spectrum sound. These lightweight and comfy Sony WF-C510 Earbuds, weighing only 4.6 grams each, are suitable for extended usage. The charging case, which weighs just 31 grams, enables for quick USB charging, making it ideal for travel. The Sony WF-C510 Earbuds have an impressive battery life, providing up to 8 hours of listening with Ambient Sound Mode (ASM) on and 11 hours with ASM off. Talk time may last up to 5 hours, guaranteeing consistent communication. The addition of SCMS-T content protection improves security for wireless audio streaming. With an ergonomic design, configurable sound settings, and excellent connection, the Sony WF-C510 TWS Earbuds provide an unrivaled mix of comfort, durability and immersive audio, making them a must-have for both music enthusiasts and professionals.

The earcups of the Tune 760NC headphones are cushioned and provide a comfortable fit while effectively isolating external noise. However, storing them can be a hassle due to their size. Pairing these headphones with your Android device is incredibly easy. Simply ensure that your Android device is compatible, turn on the headphones, and your mobile device will prompt you to pair them. With a simple tap on the screen, the pairing process will automatically complete.
Built-In Microphone
The JBL Tune 760NC headphones come equipped with a microphone that allows you to conveniently make phone calls without using your hands when connected to your smartphone. Additionally, you can utilize the microphone to give voice instructions to the digital assistant on your mobile device.

Microlab ANC H10 Bluetooth Headphone
The Microlab ANC H10 Bluetooth Headphone is a feature-rich, high-performance audio device engineered to deliver superior sound quality, convenience, and versatility for modern users. At its core, the Microlab ANC H10 houses 40mm dynamic speaker drivers that produce a wide frequency response range of 20Hz to 20KHz, ensuring crisp treble, vibrant mids, and deep bass for a truly immersive listening experience. With Active Noise Cancellation ANC technology, the Microlab ANC H10 Headphones block ambient noise effectively, making it ideal for focused work sessions, travel, or entertainment in noisy environments. The headphone supports Bluetooth version 5.3, providing a stable, energy-efficient, and low-latency wireless connection, allowing uninterrupted music playback and seamless switching between devices. For those who prefer hands-free calls, the Microlab ANCH10 comes equipped with a built-in microphone that offers crystal-clear voice capture, making wireless communication effortless. The H10 includes a 500mAh rechargeable battery with a protection board for safe and efficient power use. It delivers a listening time of 6 to 8 hours, a talk time of around 3.5 hours, and an impressive standby time of up to 4 months, making it a reliable companion for daily use. Charging is quick via the modern USB Type-C interface, with a full charge requiring only 1.5 hours. Beyond Bluetooth playback, the Microlab ANC H10 Bluetooth Headphone supports TF card input for direct music playback and includes a built-in FM radio with a frequency range of 87.5–108MHz, offering versatile entertainment even without a connected device. With an input sensitivity of 400 mV, impedance of 32 ohms, and speaker sensitivity of 108dB ±3dB, the Microlab ANC H10 ensures powerful and responsive audio output across all usage modes. Built for durability and comfort, the Microlab ANC H10 Headphone is the perfect choice for audiophiles, gamers, commuters, and professionals seeking immersive sound and all-day functionality.

Description
JBL Tour Pro 2 Smart True Wireless Earbuds
JBL Tour Pro 2 True Wireless Earbuds feature the world's first smart case for a seamless experience. True Adaptive Noise Cancelling technology filters away distractions so you can enjoy your favorite songs in great spatial audio on the fly. The one-of-a-kind smart charging case gives you immediate access to all major earbuds features without the need for a smartphone app. All App functions are accessible via the smart case from non-smartphone devices such as laptops, PCs, televisions, and so on. JBL Tour Pro 2's smart charging case has a 1.45-inch display to control important JBL Headphones App features without using your phone for a totally seamless experience. The revolutionary Bluetooth-enabled smart charging case allows you to immerse yourself in multidimensional audio for up to 40 hours on a single charge. The 6-mic technology of JBL Tour Pro 2 offers outstanding call quality in every situation. Turn on Personal Sound Amplification to increase the loudness of your and others' voices without having to remove your earbuds.
Seamless Control with Smart Case
The JBL Tour Pro 2's Smart Case adds a new level of convenience. Manage your earbuds' settings, answer calls, control playing, modify audio settings, and even set alarms from the charging case's screen. Say goodbye to having to take out your phone. JBL Tour Pro 2 offers a totally seamless experience with this one-of-a-kind smart charging case, independent of your phone or the JBL Headphones App.
True Adaptive Noise Cancelling with Smart Ambient
Enjoy your favorite music without interruptions wherever you are. With the help of four noise-sensing microphones, the True Adaptive Noise Cancelling technology in the JBL Tour Pro 2 allows you to adjust to your environment in real time. When you need to focus, this reduces disruptions, and the JBL Headphones app lets you fine-tune ANC mode management.
Crystal-Clear Calls with 6-Mic Voice Control
Thanks to the JBL Tour Pro 2's 6-mic crystal call technology, enjoy crystal-clear conversations even in noisy or windy conditions. It also supports voice assistant integration, allowing you to easily access your favorite voice assistant. You can manage how much background noise you hear using VoiceAware.
Smart Ambient Technology
Stay connected to the world around you while enjoying your music. Smart Ambient technology of JBL Tour Pro 2 puts you in control, with easy button access and customization options through the JBL Headphones app.
Legendary Pro Sound
JBL Tour Pro 2 Earbuds come equipped with 10mm dynamic drivers to deliver deep, powerful bass. It has a better sound curve that offers precise, distortion-free audio at any frequency or level.
Immersive JBL Spatial Sound
JBL Tour Pro 2 Smart True Wireless Earbuds feature JBL Spatial Sound that brings you to a theater, concert, or recording studio with your favorite musicians. This patented technology converts any source or device into a surround sound experience.
Personalized Sound Amplification
Personal Sound Amplification on the JBL Tour Pro 2 lets you change the balance and boost conversation loudness by +15–20dB, enhancing talks.
Hands-Free Voice Control
Voice control allows you to stay connected to your digital environment. Simply say "Hey Google" or "Alexa" to activate your favorite voice assistant and control your JBL Tour Pro 2 earbuds with multilingual speech prompts.
Fast Pair Enabled by Google and Microsoft Swift Pair
With Google Fast Pair, you can easily connect your JBL Tour Pro 2 True Wireless Earbuds with a single press. Microsoft Swift Pair allows you to pair Bluetooth devices with your Windows 10 PC in a smooth manner.
Total Control with the JBL Headphones App
The JBL Headphones app allows you to customize your audio experience. Customize your EQ, enable Adaptive Noise Cancellation, alter ambient sound settings, find your earphones, and more. You may also customize gesture controls, optimize audio or video output, and select your preferred voice assistant.
Bluetooth 5.3 LE Audio
The JBL Tour Pro 2 features Bluetooth 5.3 for a stable and secure wireless connection. Stay ahead with the latest Bluetooth technology, making your JBL Tour Pro 2 virtually future-proof.

Description
Baseus PPBD25K Bipow Digital Display 25W 20000mAh Power Bank
The Baseus Bipow Digital Display 25W 20000mAh Power Bank is a device that is always worth having with you. This is especially important if you use many electronic devices at the same time and you care about constant access to energy, without worrying about discharging them at the least expected moment. The Baseus power bank will be perfect for travel, in the office, at home, and wherever you need fast and safe charging of any device, such as a smartphone, tablet, camera, or headphones. Several sockets of different types make it an extremely versatile accessory.
iQ Smart Charging Technology
The Baseus Bipow Digital Display 25W 20000mAh Power Bank has iQ Smart Charging technology, that provides extremely fast charging for smartphones, tablets, MP3 players, cameras, and other mobile devices on the market. The Baseus power bank will automatically select the optimal charging speed for each connected device.
Advanced security
The Baseus Bipow Digital Display 25W 20000mAh Power Bank has been taken care of safety, equipping it with a security setting: against overcharging, discharge, overvoltages, overheating, overcurrent current, short circuits, and electromagnetic field.
Automatic operation
The Baseus Bipow Digital Display 25W 20000mAh Power Bank provides comfortable use, you only need to connect the device, and the charging process will start automatically, without having to press any buttons.
Charge 3 devices simultaneously
The compact power bank with 2 USB ports and a USB-C port will quickly charge the most demanding devices. High-speed USB QC3.0 and USB-C PD output with the built-in smart processor, ensures optimal charging speed to suit different devices.The Baseus Power Bank is compatible with all USB-powered devices, including Android or iOS smartphones and tablets. The power bank allows you to simultaneously charge the power bank and devices connected to it.
Modern design
The Baseus Bipow also has an elegant finish with a modern design. Very good quality materials from which the housing was made will appeal to every user. Small dimensions and a low weight thanks to the use of lithium-polymer cells will make the Bipow power bank ideal for home or travel.
Fast charging of your equipment
The Baseus Bipow Digital Display 25W 20000mAh Power Bank supports fast charging with a power of up to 25 W. It is perfect for powering Huawei, Xiaomi, or Samsung smartphones. Your devices can be back up and running in no time– a great time saver! What about the power bank itself? To fully charge it, 3 hours are enough.
Connect several devices at the same time
The device is equipped with several sockets, thanks to which you can connect more than one device to it at the same time. The product has 2 output ports: USB1 18W QC, which will allow you to instantly charge smartphones and tablets, and USB2 12W, to which you can connect your phone, small fan, or night light. In contrast, the USB-C 25W input/output port supports the PD fast charging protocol and is backward compatible with iPhone 12/13 (PD 20W). Charge 3 devices at the same time – you no longer have to wait for the first one to be charged before you connect the next ones!

Fantech ALTO HG26 7.1 Virtual Surround Sound Gaming Headphone
The Fantech ALTO HG26 gaming headphone delivers realistic and immersive audio. The headset's virtual 7.1 surround sound creates a three-dimensional sound environment that enhances the gaming experience. The headset also has RGB gradient lighting, which gives it a cool and vibrant appearance. The ABS core structure of the headset makes it both strong and lightweight. The headset features a USB connector, so you can plug it in and play without installing any drivers. The headphones also have a tangle-free nylon braided cord. The headphone's 50mm speaker driver offers a powerful and balanced sound. The frequency response is 20–20,000 Hz, the sensitivity is 109 dB, the impedance is 32, and the overall harmonic distortion is 5%. The Fantech ALTO HG26 7.1 Virtual Surround Sound Gaming Headphone also incorporates a headset volume control on the ear cup, allowing you to effortlessly adjust the sound level. The headphone contains an integrated microphone with an omnidirectional design and noise cancellation. The microphone can clearly capture your voice and eliminate background noise. The microphone has a frequency response range of 20–20,000 Hz, a sensitivity range of -38 dB, and an impedance range of 2200. The microphone is also designed to be flexible, allowing you to alter the position of the microphone for your comfort. The Fantech ALTO HG26 is an excellent alternative for gamers desiring realistic and immersive sound while being comfortable and convenient.

Description
Synco G3 Compact Dual Wireless Microphone System
With the Synco G3, content makers may greatly increase the versatility of their audio setup. This small, digital wireless microphone system doubles as a two-way communication system and a stand-alone recorder. The transmitters, which have microphones integrated into them, reliably broadcast speech that is clear and understandable up to a distance of 820 feet. Every transmitter has an inbuilt recorder with onboard memory so that backup audio can be recorded while the transmitter is still communicating with the receiver. The Synco G3 microphone can be used as an intercom system by inserting headphones into the transmitters. This microphone allows for two-way wireless communication between the director and talent (on the transmitter side) as well as transmitting to the receiver. For convenient connection to a computer, an iOS/Android phone or tablet, or a DSLR or mirrorless camera, the G3 has three different kinds of output connections. Three devices can simultaneously receive high-quality audio by using each output individually. You can utilize the system straight out of the box with the simple plug-and-play pairing feature. The system is ideal for recording two-person videos for YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok, as well as for live streaming and online meetings since it only requires one receiver and two microphones.
1-to-2 System for 3-Channel Recording
To improve the interactive audio environment, Synco G3 uses the 2-way communication system in conjunction with the receiver and transmitters (the 3-channel recording system) to converse and record sounds in real-time up to a maximum distance of 250 meters.
Three Outputs for All Devices
Synco G3 can connect to cameras, mobile devices, and computers with the receiver features of three USB-C digital, TRRS, and TRS outputs. This allows the podcaster to simultaneously distribute findings to three distinct platforms.

Description
FUJIFILM X-S20 Mirrorless Camera (Only Body)
The FUJIFILM X-S20 has X-Processor with 5 imaging engine and the 26.1-megapixel X Trans CMOS 4 sensor work together to produce fast picture and video processing, better AF speed and accuracy, FUJIFILM's well recognized color science, and five-axis in-body image stabilization up to seven stops. The FUJIFILM X-S20 is an excellent video camera with a Vlog mode that allows you to shoot high-quality film while making simple touchscreen tweaks. The X-S20 camera's focusing mechanism is customized for the best possible content creation with the Product Priority and Background Defocus modes. With two 3.5mm jacks—one for an external microphone and the other for headphones—the camera's stunning visuals may be accompanied with music of the highest caliber. High-quality broadcasting may be accessed via a USB-C connector for 4K at 60 frames per second and Full HD streaming, and external devices can capture raw video via the micro-HDMI output. The X-S20 has a sleek, user-friendly design that contributes to its smooth handling and effective shooting. The camera has more noticeable buttons and bigger dials. The FUJIFILM X-S20 also has a rear 3.0" 1.84m-dot touchscreen LCD with a vari-angle design that allows it to be used from high, low, and front-facing angles. It also has a brilliant 2.36m-dot electronic viewfinder. The camera supports Wi-Fi and Bluetooth wireless connections and features a USB-C connector for tethering and other digital interfaces. You may view and transfer photographs, watch Live View on the camera, and control the camera remotely with the exclusive FUJIFILM XApp. Longer shooting durations are provided by the rechargeable lithium-ion NP-W235 battery, partly because of the processor's increased efficiency.
26.1MP APS-C X-Trans BSI CMOS 4 Sensor and X-Processor 5
The FUJIFILM X-S20 combines the X-Trans CMOS 4 sensor, which is a flexible and well-reliable 26.1MP APS-C format sensor, with the X-Processor 5, which enables the camera to produce its smooth tones and colors at a faster rate for an extended period of time. The in-body image stabilization significantly enhances the wide native sensitivity range of ISO 160-12800 and the increased low-light performance. Because it is an X-Trans sensor, it also uses a randomized pixel array, which eliminates the need for an optical low-pass filter and results in very crisp and high-quality images.
6K, 4K, and Full HD Video Recording
A wide range of video features are also available with the X-S20, such as internal 6K recording at up to 30 frames per second and Full HD recording at up to 240 frames per second for very slow-motion viewing. The X-Processor 5's speed significantly improves overall video performance by allowing for quick read rates during video recording and assisting in the reduction of rolling shutter distortion while capturing moving subjects. The FUJIFILM X-S20 camera has a 3.5mm microphone jack for more sophisticated audio recording and another 3.5mm headphone jack for audio monitoring. It also has a micro-HDMI port that allows 12-bit 4:2:2 recording to an optional external recorder for better quality.
User-Friendly Video Modes
The FUJIFILM X-S20 has several shooting modes designed to meet various requirements. The camera's mode dial now has a new Vlog mode that makes it simple to change the camera's settings while filming movies by using the touchscreen. Product Priority mode is great for unpacking or product videos since it automatically shifts the emphasis from your face to the object in front of you. With only a few clicks, you can get that dramatic appearance by blurring away the backdrop using the backdrop Defocus setting.
Improved Autofocus
Its subject-detection AF, powered by the X-Processor 5 and Deep-Learning AI Technology, follows and recognizes human faces and eyes in addition to a variety of other subjects, like as animals, birds, automobiles, motorbikes, and even drones. Additionally, the FUJIFILM X-S20 has a better auto-focus prediction algorithm that ensures steady focusing even while shooting continually moving subjects. This is especially useful in low-contrast and Zone AF scenarios. The FUJIFILM X-S20 camera's AUTO mode combines subject recognition and focusing to keep everything crisp so you never miss a critical moment and can compose and create with confidence.

Description
SoundPEATS Opera 05
The SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds are a flagship offering in the brand’s high-fidelity lineup, designed for users who demand immersive audio and cutting-edge features. These SoundPEATS Wireless Earbuds feature a powerful triple-driver hybrid setup a large 12mm dynamic driver paired with dual balanced armature drivers delivering rich bass, detailed mids, and crisp highs for a truly dynamic listening experience.
Certified for Hi-Res Audio Wireless and equipped with LDAC codec support, the SoundPEATS Opera 05 Bluetooth Earbuds offer studio-grade sound over Bluetooth 5.3, ensuring stable transmission and low latency. Whether you're streaming music, gaming, or taking calls, the SoundPEATS Opera 05 TWS earbuds deliver clarity and depth that rival wired headphones.
Advanced features like adaptive active noise cancellation (ANC) up to 30dB and Transparency Mode allow you to control your sound environment with ease. With up to 9 hours of playback per charge and 33 hours total with the charging case, these SoundPEATS earbuds are built for all-day use. The sleek design includes touch controls, IPX4 water resistance, and a premium finish with gold accents for a stylish, durable look.
Compatible with the SoundPEATS app, users can customize EQ settings, update firmware, and fine-tune controls to match their preferences. Whether you're an audiophile or a casual listener, the SoundPEATS Opera 05 combines high-end sound, smart features, and elegant design to elevate your wireless audio experience.
Key Features – SoundPEATS Opera 05 TWS Earbuds
Triple-Driver Hybrid Setup: Combines 12mm dynamic driver with dual balanced armature drivers for rich, detailed sound
Hi-Res Audio Wireless Certified: Supports LDAC codec for near-lossless audio over Bluetooth
Bluetooth 5.3: Ensures stable, low-latency connection across devices
Adaptive ANC: Reduces ambient noise up to 30dB for immersive listening
Dual Mic ENC: Enhances call clarity by filtering out background noise
Transparency Mode: Lets in ambient sound for situational awareness
Long Battery Life: Up to 9 hours per charge, 33 hours total with charging case
Touch Controls: Easy access to playback, calls, ANC, and voice assistant
App Support: Customize EQ, update firmware, and control features via SoundPEATS app
IPX4 Water Resistance: Protects against sweat and splashes for active use
LDAC Audio Codec
The SoundPEATS Opera 05 Bluetooth Earbuds support the LDAC audio codec, enabling transmission of high-resolution audio over Bluetooth at up to 990 kbps. This means you get richer detail, deeper bass, and clearer highs perfect for audiophiles who want near-lossless sound without the wires. Combined with Hi-Res Audio Wireless certification, these SoundPEATS Opera 05 TWS earbuds deliver studio-grade performance on the go.
Block Noise, Stay Clear with ANC and Dual Mic ENC
Equipped with adaptive active noise cancellation (ANC) up to 30dB, the SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds effectively reduce ambient distractions like traffic, chatter, or wind. For calls, the dual-mic ENC (Environmental Noise Cancellation) system isolates your voice and filters out background noise, ensuring crystal-clear communication even in noisy environments. Whether you're commuting or working remotely, these SoundPEATS Wireless Earbuds keep your audio focused and uninterrupted.
IPX4 Water Resistance
The SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds feature IPX4 water resistance, making them splash-proof and sweat-resistant ideal for workouts, light rain, or everyday use. This added durability ensures your earbuds stay protected during active routines, giving you peace of mind whether you're at the gym or on the move.
Frequently Asked Questions – SoundPEATS Opera 05 Bluetooth Earbuds
Q1: What makes the SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds unique?
A: They feature a triple-driver hybrid setup with LDAC support and Hi-Res Audio Wireless certification for premium sound quality.
Q2: How long does the battery last?
A: You get up to 9 hours of playback on a single charge, and up to 33 hours total with the charging case.
Q3: Do the SoundPEATS Opera 05 TWS earbuds support noise cancellation?
A: Yes, they offer adaptive ANC up to 30dB and dual-mic ENC for clear calls in noisy environments.
Q4: Are these earbuds water-resistant?
A: Yes, they have an IPX4 rating, making them resistant to sweat and light splashes.
Q5: Can I customize sound settings?
A: Absolutely. The SoundPEATS app lets you adjust EQ, toggle ANC modes, and update firmware.
Q6: What Bluetooth version do they use?
A: These SoundPEATS Opera 05 earbuds use Bluetooth 5.3 for faster pairing and stable connectivity.
Q7: Are the SoundPEATS Wireless Earbuds compatible with iOS and Android?
A: Yes, SoundPEATS Opera 05 work seamlessly with both iOS and Android devices via Bluetooth.

Description
Universal Audio Volt 276 USB-C Audio Interface
The Universal Audio Volt 276 takes use of UA's legendary analog expertise to create a USB-C audio interface befitting of a decades-long reputation. The Volt 276 has first-rate analog circuitry as well as class-leading 24-bit/192kHz AD/DA conversion, allowing you to produce professional-sounding music productions, live streaming, and podcasts. This bus-powered audio interface has two microphone preamplifiers, switchable 610-style analog sound, and input metering. The crown gem of this interface, however, is its built-in 1176-derived FET compressor with three push-button application modes. Aside from that, dual analog outputs and a headphones output make monitoring a breeze, and direct monitoring is available for zero-latency operation. In addition, you have MIDI I/O for your synthesizers and controllers. The Volt 276 vaunts a rugged, retro-inspired industrial design and comes with a cutting-edge native software bundle.
Armed with class-leading AD/DA conversion
The Universal Audio Volt 276 has excellent AD/DA conversion, which is a must-have feature for professional-sounding recordings. This enhanced conversion circuitry provides full 24-bit/192kHz performance, delivering true-to-life detail and clarity with a high degree of dimensionality. Sweetwater experts have discovered that projects produced with this USB-C audio interface are completely top-notch. You'll be able to make rock-solid, album-worthy tunes with the Volt 276 in your studio.
Infuses your tracks with 610-style analog sound
UA is known for its traditional analog designs, and Volt 276 exemplifies that expertise. This audio interface has two analog mic/line preamplifiers that sound uncannily identical to Universal Audio's famous 610 tube preamplifier. The Vintage Preamp Mode on the Volt 276 uses skillfully built op-amps and solid-state circuitry to provide tube-like dynamic saturation and clipping, giving you strong, intuitive tone shaping for your microphones and line-level inputs. The best part is that Vintage Preamp Mode is configurable, allowing you to use the Volt 276 with external preamps and channel strips without adding coloring.
Includes a real-deal 1176-derived FET compressor
The UREI 1176 is a classic pro studio workhorse that can add punch and presence to everything from drums to guitars to voices. The Volt 276 has an integrated FET compressor based on the vintage 1176. However, this is not a digital simulation; rather, it is a genuine analog compressor. The compressor on the Volt 276 has three simple push-button modes for Vocals, Guitars, and Fast sources (the latter is designed specifically for drumming), providing appropriate settings for every source. The Universal Audio Volt 276 USB-C Audio Interface has no warranty.
