Description
Sony WH-ULT900N Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphone
The Sony WH-ULT900N Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphone is intended to provide an immersive music experience with strong bass and superior noise cancellation technologies. The Sony WH-ULT900N Wireless Headphone, with 40mm neodymium speakers, has a broad frequency response of 5 Hz to 20,000 Hz (wired) and 20 Hz to 20,000 Hz (Bluetooth communication at 44.1 kHz sampling frequency). The Dual Noise Sensor technology, paired with the Integrated Processor V1, improves digital noise cancellation, making the Sony WH-ULT900N Headphone ideal for muting external disturbances. With a ULT button, users may choose between ULT1 for deep bass and ULT2 for a funky, punchy bass impact, which is great for bass enthusiasts. The headphones support DSEE (Digital Sound Enhancement Engine), which ensures high-quality audio restoration for optimal sound. Bluetooth 5.2 provides smooth connectivity, with an effective range of roughly 10 meters and compatibility for audio formats such as SBC and AAC. The Sony WH-ULT900N Bluetooth Headphone also has a multipoint connection, which allows for quick switching between two devices. The Sony | Headphones Connect app allows users to fine-tune their listening experience and fully customize their audio settings. The Sony WH-ULT900N BT Headphone's built-in electret condenser microphone allows for omnidirectional speech pickup, assuring crisp calls. The Sony WH-ULT900N Headphone's long-lasting battery provides up to 30 hours of listening with noise cancellation turned on and 50 hours without it, with a full charge requiring about 3.5 hours via USB. This Sony Bluetooth Headphone has a detachable 1.2-meter audio cable with a gold-plated L-shaped stereo small connector for high-quality wired listening as well. The Sony WH-ULT900N Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphone is designed for comfort, weighing roughly 255 grams and featuring an adjustable headband with cushioned ear cups for the optimal fit. The presence of an ambient sound option allows users to be aware of their surroundings when necessary, making the Sony WH-ULT900N Wireless Headphone ideal for travel, business, or pleasure. Whether you want powerful bass, crystal-clear sound, or industry-leading noise cancellation, the Sony WH-ULT900N Headphones provide a premium listening experience.

The Asus Nuc 14 Essential Intel Core 3 N355 Mini Pc is built for energy economy and dependable performance, making it suitable for both personal and business applications. With a low TDP of 15W, this CPU offers minimal power consumption while providing smooth performance for common computer applications like as surfing, office software, and media playing. The integrated Intel Graphics enables seamless visual processing, resulting in crisp visuals and fluid rendering for both business and entertainment applications. Connectivity is a noteworthy feature, with Intel Wi-Fi 6E AX211 (Gig+) providing high-speed wireless internet access with low latency, assuring consistent network performance. Bluetooth 5.3 improves device pairing efficiency, allowing users to connect peripherals like wireless keyboards, headphones, and speakers with ease. The Realtek Ethernet Controller RTL8125BG-CG allows wired connections. Whether you're connecting gadgets or using high-speed internet, you can anticipate a flawless experience. The Realtek 2.5G Ethernet controller enables quick data flow for wired connections, eliminating latency in both business and household environments. The Asus Nuc 14 Essential Mini Pc is designed for adaptability, with several ports to accommodate a variety of devices. Using USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C and Type-A connectors, file transfers are rapid and efficient. HDMI 2.1 and DisplayPort 1.4 support high-resolution display output, making presentations, video streaming, and multitasking more pleasurable. A 3.5mm headset connector delivers good audio for conversation and enjoyment, and the Kensington Lock provides an added degree of protection. Realtek ALC3251 improves audio quality, providing clear and immersive sound whether on a video chat or listening to music. The Asus Nuc 14 Essential Intel Core 3 N355 includes an AC adapter and power wire for easy installation, a VESA bracket for flexible mounting choices, and necessary safety and warranty papers for peace of mind. With its performance, connection, and intelligent design, this system is a solid choice for professionals, students, and casual users. Whether it's everyday productivity or enjoyment, it's intended to meet current computing demands while assuring efficiency and simplicity of use.
Efficient Performance with Low Power Consumption
The Intel Core 3 N355 processor, featured in the Asus Nuc 14 Essential Mini PC, is designed for efficient everyday computing with a low 15W TDP to ensure power-saving performance. Built on the Alder Lake-N architecture, it has 8 cores and a turbo boost of up to 3.9 GHz, allowing for seamless multitasking for office work, online surfing, and media streaming. The integrated Intel UHD Graphics 770 enables three 4K screens, making it perfect for productive settings. It supports DDR4, DDR5, and LPDDR5 memory, as well as PCIe Gen 3 connection, allowing for faster data throughput and responsiveness. Perfect for small workstations, its power economy, adaptable connection, and dependable performance make it a perfect choice for home and business use.
Multitask with Triple Display Support
The Asus Nuc 14 Essential Intel Core 3 N355 Mini PC is intended for efficient multitasking and can accommodate up to three 4K screens in a 0.56L chassis. Whether you're running software, working in meetings, or streaming immersive films, this small PC delivers low latency, optimal battery usage, and seamless data transmission. Its capacity to support numerous displays makes it ideal for productivity, education, and entertainment. The Asus Nuc 14 Essential, with its compact design and excellent performance, provides a diverse computing experience that improves work and leisure efficiency. Stay connected, work smarter, and experience breathtaking images effortlessly.

Vention THSHC 12-in-1 USB Type-C Docking Station
The Vention THSHC Docking Station is a premium 12-in-1 USB Type-C hub that delivers powerful performance, versatility, and convenience for users who need seamless connectivity. With its plug-and-play compatibility across multiple systems, the Vention THSHC Docking Station eliminates driver hassles and boosts productivity for professionals, students, and creators. Description
JBL Live Flex 3
The JBL Live Flex 3 true wireless earbuds redefine personal audio with a premium blend of high-performance sound, smart technology, and user-first design. Each earbud in the JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds features a powerful 12 mm dynamic driver, delivering rich, lifelike audio across a wide frequency range of 20 Hz to 40 kHz, perfect for deep bass and crisp treble. With an impedance of 13 ohms and sensitivity of 100 dB SPL, the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds ensure loud and clear playback with minimal distortion. These JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds also come equipped with Hi-Res Audio support and JBL Spatial Sound, creating a dynamic, theater-like listening experience. A key highlight of the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds is the True Adaptive Noise Cancelling technology, powered by four smart microphones that adjust in real-time to block out external noise. The JBL Headphones App allows users to customize ANC levels based on ear shape using its built-in compensation filter. For calls, the JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds feature six beamforming microphones with advanced noise and wind suppression, ensuring your voice remains crystal clear. Voice equalizer, personal sound amplification, and ambient sound controls give you full command over both incoming and outgoing audio quality. Connectivity is seamless with Bluetooth 5.3 in the earbuds and Bluetooth 5.1 in the Smart Charging Case, supporting features like multi-point connection and Google Audio Switch for hassle-free transitions between Android devices. The Google Finder function helps locate misplaced earbuds via an Android network, adding convenience to your daily routine. Built tough with an IP55 rating, the JBL Live Flex 3 Earbuds are both dustproof and water-resistant, ideal for outdoor or active use. Battery life on the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds is impressive: enjoy up to 10 hours of playback ANC off, plus 40 additional hours from the charging case. With fast USB-C charging, just 10 minutes gives 4 extra hours, and the case also supports wireless charging. The Smart Charging Case not only powers the earbuds but also allows you to manage settings like volume, EQ, and call control directly from its screen. You can even customize its display with personal photos for added flair. Thanks to Personi-fi 3.0, users can shape their audio based on hearing preferences, while the JBL Headphones App offers full control over gesture behavior, ambient sound, and voice assistant selection. Compact, feature-rich, and stylish, the JBL Live Flex 3 Wireless Earbuds offer everything from cinematic audio to personalized control, making them the ultimate all-in-one audio solution for any lifestyle.
Hi-Res Audio Wireless with JBL signature sound
The JBL Live Flex 3 offers a premium Hi-Res Audio Wireless experience, combining advanced acoustic engineering with JBL’s legendary Signature Sound. Featuring precisely tuned 12mm dynamic drivers, these earbuds deliver deep, punchy bass, a well-balanced mid-range, and smooth, refined high frequencies, ensuring rich, full-spectrum sound at any volume level. Whether you're listening to music, watching movies, or taking calls, the sound remains consistently dynamic and immersive. Enhanced with JBL Spatial Sound technology, the JBL Live Flex 3 creates a wide, three-dimensional soundstage that surrounds you from every direction—making you feel as if you're right in the center of a concert hall or live performance. This truly elevates the way you experience audio, delivering JBL’s iconic sound quality at its very best.

JBL Wave Beam 2
The JBL Wave Beam 2 TWS earbuds are engineered to deliver immersive sound, smart noise control, and everyday convenience in a sleek, ergonomic design. Each earbud is equipped with dual microphones for crystal-clear voice pickup, making them ideal for calls in noisy environments. The Bluetooth 5.3 connection ensures stable performance, while multi-point connectivity and Google Fast Pair allow effortless switching between devices. Whether you're commuting, working, or relaxing, these JBL earbuds with long battery life ensure uninterrupted listening throughout the day. With fast charging support, just a 10-minute charge gives you up to 3 hours of playback—ideal for on-the-go users who need reliable power from their JBL TWS earbuds.
Water & Dust Resistant
Designed for durability, the JBL Wave Beam 2 earbuds feature an IP54 rating, making them resistant to dust and water splashes. Whether you're hitting the gym, walking in the rain, or navigating a busy commute, these JBL TWS earbuds are built to withstand everyday challenges. If you're looking for water-resistant JBL earbuds that combine rugged performance with sleek design, the Wave Beam 2 is a smart and stylish choice.

Description
Dahua DHI-LM30-E330CA 30" 200Hz WFHD Curved Gaming Monitor
The Dahua DHI-LM30-E330CA is an immersive 30-inch curved gaming monitor designed to bring your gaming experience to new heights of realism and performance. With a Wide Full HD resolution of 2560x1080 pixels, every detail pops off the screen with stunning clarity and depth, immersing you in the action. This monitor's VA display panel produces rich, brilliant colors and deep blacks, resulting in realistic and lifelike pictures for an unrivaled gaming experience. With a remarkable 200Hz refresh rate and an ultra-fast 1ms MPRT response time, it provides buttery-smooth gameplay with minimum motion blur, ideal for fast-paced gaming scenarios requiring split-second reflexes. The DHI-LM30-E330CA provides a wide range of connectivity options to meet your gaming needs, including two HDMI 2.0 ports capable of delivering a 180Hz refresh rate and two DisplayPort 1.2 ports with a maximum refresh rate of 200Hz, as well as an audio output port for seamless integration with external speakers or headphones. This offers adaptable connectivity with gaming consoles, PCs, and other entertainment devices, allowing you to design the ideal gaming setup based on your preferences. The DHI-LM30-E330CA is designed for optimum comfort and flexibility, with a 1500R curvature that completely immerses you in the gaming experience by wrapping around your field of view and eliminating distortion at the screen's corners. Furthermore, its VESA wall mount compatibility provides easy installation choices, letting you to maximize your gaming area and find the ideal viewing angle for long gaming sessions.
200Hz High Refresh Rate
With a high refresh rate of 200Hz of DHI-LM30-E330CA Monitor, your display will be capable of meeting professional gaming standards. Enjoy an ultra-smooth experience with no noticeable screen blur.
1ms Response Time
1ms MPRT provides speed without the smear, resulting in an improved gaming experience. Fast-paced action and dramatic transitions will be presented seamlessly, without the irritating effects of ghosting with Dahua DHI-LM30-E330CA monitor.
Adaptive Sync Technology
The Adaptive-Sync Technology of DHI-LM30-E330CA Monitor is compatible with AMD and NVIDIA graphics cards, and outputs the picture frame rate and display refresh rate in step with the GPU, thereby solving the picture tearing and lagging problems, allowing each frame to be fully displayed, and safeguarding your excellent performance.

Description
Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone
The Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone is a premium over-ear audio solution designed for both audiophiles and everyday users seeking high-quality wireless sound. Powered by Dual Noise Sensor Technology and Sony’s advanced Integrated Processor V1, the Sony WH-CH720N Bluetooth Headphone delivers a rich, immersive listening experience by effectively cancelling ambient noise across various environments. Featuring a compact yet powerful 30 mm dynamic driver unit, it reproduces clear and vibrant audio with a frequency response range of 7 Hz to 20,000 Hz (JEITA) and supports Bluetooth® communication at 20 Hz to 20,000 Hz (sampling frequency 44.1 kHz). The headphone's impedance measures 325 ohms at 1 kHz when powered on and 31 ohms when powered off, while sensitivity reaches up to 108 dB/mW when active and 99 dB/mW in passive mode, ensuring excellent audio performance in both wired and wireless modes. Engineered for long listening sessions, the Sony WH-CH720N Headphones are impressively lightweight at just 192 grams, with plush ear cushions and an ergonomic design that prioritizes comfort. It supports passive operation, DSEE (Digital Sound Enhancement Engine) for restoring compressed music, and includes Ambient Sound Mode, allowing users to stay aware of their surroundings—a valuable feature for commuting or outdoor use. With Bluetooth version 5.2, the headphone ensures fast, stable connections within a 10-meter range, supporting popular profiles such as A2DP, AVRCP, HFP, and HSP and audio codecs like SBC and AAC, along with SCMS-T content protection for secure wireless streaming. The Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone also shines in battery performance, offering up to 35 hours of continuous music playback with Noise Cancelling (NC) turned on, and an extended 50 hours with NC off. For calls, it supports up to 40 hours of continuous communication time (NC off), making it ideal for work, travel, or daily use. Recharging is simple and efficient with USB charging that takes approximately 3.5 hours for a full battery. For added flexibility, the headphones come with a 1.2-meter single-sided detachable cable and a gold-plated L-shaped stereo mini plug, ensuring excellent wired connectivity when needed. Finished in stylish color options—Black, White, Blue, and Pink—the Sony WH-CH720N Bluetooth Headphone strikes the perfect balance between innovative technology, comfort, long-lasting power, and signature Sony audio quality. Whether you're working, traveling, or relaxing, the Sony WH-CH720N offers everything you need in a modern wireless headphone.
Dual Noise Sensor Technology
Experience uninterrupted listening with the Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphone, featuring advanced Dual Noise Sensor technology and the powerful Integrated Processor V1 for next-level noise cancellation. Whether you're commuting or relaxing, two microphones in each earcup work to capture and block ambient noise, allowing your music to take center stage. With the Sony | Headphones Connect app, you can fine-tune ambient sound across 20 levels, letting you control how much of the outside world you let in. Lightweight and comfortable with long battery life, the WH-CH720N lets you listen smarter, longer, and without distractions.

Description
Xtrike Me GH-510 RGB Stereo Gaming Headphone
The Xtrike Me GH-510 RGB Stereo Gaming Headphone delivers high-quality sound and voice during gaming sessions. It features a stereo sound system with a frequency response of 20Hz - 20KHz, resulting in clean and balanced audio for your games, music, and movies. The Xtrike Me GH-510 RGB Stereo Gaming Headphone features a 50mm speaker with a rated power of 10mW, a speaker impedance of (20 + 15%)Ω, and a speaker sensitivity of 110dB ±3 dB, providing loud and immersive sound output. The headphone contains an omnidirectional microphone with a size of 6 x 2.7mm and a sensitivity of -38dB ±3 dB. It can catch your voice clearly and correctly while reducing background noise. The headset also contains a static RGB backlight, which can make your gaming experience more enjoyable and colorful. You may also change the illumination color using the software that comes with the headphones. The Xtrike Me GH-510 RGB Gaming Headphone features a USB 2.0 port that allows for easy and safe connection to your device. It also includes a 2.1m cable length, which allows you plenty of freedom and flexibility when moving around. The headphone also supports Windows 7 or higher, ensuring USB headphone compatibility and performance with your PC and games.
